evidence: "It's so difficult to find a good, clean movie nowadays."
"The story lines are simple and fun."
"The concept is fun, but the movie didn't make us laugh, cry, awww, or feel great."
"This one is my daughter least favorite of the series because it's slow going."
"I focus on the story/entertainment regardless of production polish."
"Even though it has a scripted feel to it, they still make me laugh."
"Look forward to more John Krasinski films."
"Emily Blunt's is my new favorite actress."
"The cast is great. They're all very funny and make the film work."
"Antonio made gun shooting look artful and poetic in one slo-mo scene."
"I don't feel right letting her watch this."

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly films with clean humor and simple storylines, often prioritizing entertainment over production quality. They appreciate suspenseful elements but have mixed feelings about emotional engagement, indicating a preference for light-hearted content.
